_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Analyze and process information using language and/or cultural expertise.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting operational process improvement for data workflows, identifying inefficiencies, designing automation opportunities, and measuring improvement outcomes.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-001 (AB, cosine: 0.471), AB-S-002 (AB, cosine: 0.470).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.522). Shared vocabulary: [process]. DCWF-only terms [analyze, cultural, expertise, information, language, using] vs WIDAI-only terms [automation, conducting, data, designing, identifying, improvement] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.854 (P=0.853, R=0.856). Balanced P/R — the 9-word DCWF element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Analyze and process information using language and/or cultural expertise." and "Skill in conducting operational process improvement for data workflows, identify" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.478 ≈ STS 0.522 (gap 0.044). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [process] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.3%. Shared tokens: [process]. DCWF-only: [analyze, cultural, expertise, information, language, using]. WIDAI-only: [automation, conducting, data, designing, identifying, improvement].
